mapper.sql: id, name, display_name, description, category, definition, input_schema, required_tools, model_override, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_ai_skill order by name asc
select from t_r_ai_skill where name = #{name} limit 1
select from t_r_ai_skill order by name asc
